title: Use the notion-knowledge-capture skill. Do not call Notion MCP. Do not use web. Produce a local draft only. Author worldview matters. Task: turn a short discussion about medical AI governance into a tiny local-only wiki note with 2 summary sentences, 2 decision bullets, and 1 open-question bullet. K...
summary_text: Summary: Medical AI governance should be framed as controllability and accountability, not just performance or market competitiveness. The discussion leaned toward mainline-vs-auxiliary use as the practical boundary for safe deployment. - Decision: Treat clinical use as auxiliary until auditability, explanation, and human sign-off are explicit. - Decision: Record any policy claim as制度上の整理, not as legal advice. - Open question: What evidence threshold should trigger a shift from auxiliary support to governed mainline use? consulted_worldview_source: /Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/philosophy.md used_obsidian_for_worldview: no worldview_contract_applied: true
